# Scarpers

> AI running coach that builds free personalised training plans for 5K, 10K, half marathon, marathon and ultra. Reads Garmin FIT files, Strava activities, sleep and readiness, then writes and adapts a week-by-week plan.

Scarpers analyses your last 8 weeks of running and 30 nights of sleep, applies a 5-zone heart-rate model and a 0–200 Running IQ score, and writes daily sessions with target intensity, pace, HR zone and cadence (BPM). Day-ahead briefings and post-workout reviews are generated by an AI persona called Coach Claire Rayners.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-up.
- [About](/about): What Scarpers is and who it's for.
- [AI Running Coach](/ai-running-coach): How the AI builds and adapts your plan.
- [5K Training Plan](/5k-training-plan): Free personalised 5K plan.
- [10K Training Plan](/10k-training-plan): Free personalised 10K plan.
- [Coach Claire Rayners](/coach/claire-rayners): The AI coach persona behind every plan.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on training, pacing and running tech.
